quiz.question:
Black plays ...a5.

Improving your pieces is always a good thing.

Is Ne5, centralizing the knight, a good move here?

answers.text: No, because Black has a tactic that wins one of our major pieces.

feedback.text: Correct! Black is threatening ...Bb4, a skewer that attacks our queen and our rook.

distractors.text: No, because Black can trade bishops on g2, which we don't want.

feedback.text: There's a tactic Black has instead!

distractors.text: Yes, because we improve the position of the knight and offer a bishop trade.

feedback.text: Black has a tactic that wins material for them, however!
